programs.title: Til Death
programs.desc: As Eddie and Joy square off over whether unplugging their toaster will save electricity, Jeff plans to throw a surprise birthday party for Steph.

programs.title: Til Death
programs.desc: When Jeff starts feeling suffocated by his marriage, Eddie suggests doing what he does: find something he can do without his wife, like his fake garage band.

programs.title: Til Death
programs.desc: After being virtually forced to spend a weekend with Joy and the Woodcocks at a mountain resort, Eddie is a changed man after learning that Steph dreamed about having sex with him.

programs.title: Til Death
programs.desc: A friend's 25th wedding anniversary party has Joy wondering why Eddie hasn't taken better care of her, while Jeff is forced to admit that he is embarrassed by Steph's sexually suggestive dance moves.

programs.title: Til Death
programs.desc: When Jeff is crushed to learn that Steph really doesn't like hockey, Eddie urges him to start developing interests separate from his wife's.

programs.title: Til Death
programs.desc: An unexpected break up with her boyfriend during her first holiday visit from college shows Eddie and Joy that their daughter, Allison, isn't the girl they remember.
